message:
Bootstrap confidence intervals currently support direct fitted-object
targets only.
✖ Unsupported bootstrap target(s): cor:re_cov:cor(mu1:(Intercept),mu1:x | p |
  id).
ℹ Requested target type(s): derived; inventory note(s):
  derived_unstructured_correlation.
ℹ Use `profile_targets()` to inspect `target_type` and `profile_note` before
  choosing bootstrap targets.
